goal: Improve the active Pacuare Unreal preview texture using cleaner March 20, 2025 Sentinel bbox review clips while preserving the production block on source-drape replacement.

processing.sentinel_layout: 16PHR and 17PKM bbox clips are independently fit to the 4096px preview canvas and combined through a broad non-linear west/east transition; this is approximate texture calibration, not native-CRS stitching.
processing.cloud_shadow_rejection: Suppress Sentinel contribution where brightness/saturation heuristics indicate cloud, blue haze, or dark shadow; use SCL reviews as provenance but do not apply native SCL masks to pixels.
processing.base_cloud_fill: Increase Sentinel vegetation-toned contribution only where the older NASA/Copernicus preview drape is cloud-like, to reduce preview cloud plates without claiming authoritative imagery coverage.
processing.blend: Use the existing 4096 NASA/Copernicus preview drape as authority, then add 10.5% baseline Sentinel tone calibration, up to 33% additional cloud-plate fill, and bounded high-frequency detail from reliable vegetation-like pixels.

allowed_use: rainforest canopy and gorge texture review
side-by-side comparison against the coarse NASA/Copernicus preview drape
future exact-route clipping and SCL masking planning
forbidden_use: production water or vegetation mask generation
promotion_blockers: Replace approximate bbox texture calibration with exact native-CRS route/bank/corridor clipping.
Apply reviewed SCL/cloud/shadow masks to accepted route windows and document usable coverage.
Stitch 16PHR/17PKM only after seam, scale, terms, and guide/geospatial review pass.
Record Sentinel terms, attribution, storage/LFS, and redistribution review before production derivative use.
Compare accepted imagery against rainfall, flow, and guide/outfitter context before using water color, wetness, or bank exposure for gameplay visuals.
review_decision: Use this file as a bounded preview calibration drape for Unreal only. It improves texture review but leaves all production photoreal, route-coverage, source-drape, mask, and lifelike-capture gates open.
